content.zh-CN: 我们更新了核心插件并修复了一些已知问题。详情请加入 Discord 群组查看完整公告。
content.en: We updated core plugins and fixed several issues. Please join the Discord for full details.

content.zh-CN:
感谢你们对服务器的支持
网站代码由AI编写可能出现错误
加群反馈错误
content.en:
Thanks for your support
We use AI to code the website
Any bug please report in our server
